description: cobblerz has come up with this stylish off-duty essential that gets all the season's hottest trends right. Wear this with your casual staples to add a fresh twist to your ensemble. Don't forget to accessorise with a matching belt, watch and socks! Comes with a shoe horn.UpperTextured leather loafers with embossed branding on the tongueStitch detail along the seams of the toe Perforations on the sides of the back foot for ventilationPadded footbedRemovable socklinerMidsoleRubber midsole with an air sole unit for cushioningOutsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel with suction points at the ends of the waffle patterned lugsShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a leather brush to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
